title: IP14 6PD, Aspall Cyder Limited: environmental permit issued – EPR/GP3432QA/V002
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit for:   Operator name: Aspall Cyder Limited Installation name: The Cyder House Permit number: EPR/GP3432QA/V002  "
